text:
The Colossal Titan is one of the Titans that appear in and attacks the .

Story

After fighting off a horde of Titans, the are exhausted from the long battle, but calls them to assemble again as reports that the Colossal Titan has just emerged downtown, near the . However, the arrive on the scene and volunteer to take the Titan on in their stead.

Trivia

The Colossal Titan appears to be mindless, showing no signs of the intelligence, special abilities, or fighting techniques characteristic of its original manga counterpart.
The Colossal Titan seems to be much larger than its manga and anime counterparts, as its hand looks almost the same size as the Statue of Liberty, which is 46 m tall, not counting the base.
